programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Māksliniece Kristiāna Dimitere ir maija bērns - viņas dzirkstošā būtība, šķiet, ir rada saulei un pavasara apņēmībai. Mežs, lauks, dārzs un draudzība ar dzīvniekiem - ikdienas pastaigās dzīvesvietā Murjāņos viņa allaž dodas kopā ar suņiem Aivaru un Pērkonu. "Dzīve ārpus pilsētas ir luksuss, kas sniedz klusumu, telpu un mieru, - tieši to, kas vajadzīgs radošam darbam," pirms dažiem gadiem izteikusies māksliniece. Dabu un īpaši ziedus Kristiāna uztver ļoti panteistiski: puķes māksliniece sauc par "paradīzes lieciniecēm" un glezno tās ar acīm - ļoti personiski. Klausoties mākslinieces dzīves pieredzē, ir viegli nolasīt, ka radošums ierakstīts viņas asinsritē. Un kā gan ne? Būdama aktieru Vijas Artmanes un Artūra Dimitera meita, savā dzīves ceļā Kristiāna nes slaveno vecāku nospiedumus. Tomēr savai profesijai viņa izvēlējusies krāsas un mālu: glezniecību un tēlniecību. Ne skatuvi. Savā mākslā viņa ir harismātiska formā un filozofe saturā. Tieši tāpēc saruna piektdienas vakara raidījumā "Daudz laimes, jubilār!" izvēršas patiesa, kultūrfaktu un asprātības piesātināta.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Čehija – Dānija
programme.desc: Izteikta favorīte šajā spēlē būs Čehijas izlase, kas vispār tikai divas reizes pasaules čempionātos zaudējusi dāņiem, savukārt, uzvaras ir astoņas. Čehi ir 2024. gada pasaules čempioni, taču kopumā viņiem tomēr neveicas tik labi kā senāk. Nupat Milānas ziemas olimpiskajās spēlēs bija tikai astotā vieta, pērn pasaules čempionātā bija sestā pozīcija. Skaidrs, ka čehi allaž tiecas pēc medaļām, bet ne vienmēr izdodas tās iegūt. Čehijas hokejam raksturīga spēka spēle un presings laukumā, taču neitrāliem līdzjutējiem bieži vien tā nav iecienītākā izlase tieši spēles stila dēļ. Dānijai tādu sasniegumu vēsturiski nav, taču tieši pēdējā laikā komandai ir liels progress, izlase elites grupā spēlē jau kopš 2010. gada, un lielākais panākums ir ceturtā vieta pērn.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā - par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi atpazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Pirmajā turnīra dienā spēļu gan nebija pārāk daudz, piektdien ASV spēlēja pret Šveici, Somija pret Vāciju, Kanāda pret Zviedriju un Čehija pret Dāniju.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Beidzot tiek arestēts Janiks Dibo. Iecirknī ierodas dokumentālo filmu veidotājs Patriss Buržuā, kurš apgalvo, ka gandrīz puse no viņa filmas varoņiem - bezpajumtniekiem - ir pazuduši bez vēsts. Gabriela uztic lietu Noelijai.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Slovākija – Norvēģija
programme.desc: Abām komandām jācīnās par iekļūšanu ceturtdaļfinālā, t. i., labāko četru komandu skaitā savā apakšgrupā. Viegli tas nebūs, jo B grupā spēlē arī Kanāda, Zviedrija, Čehija un Dānija. Vismaz pirmās trīs no minētajām vienībām noteikti jāpieskaita favorītēm. Slovāki pēdējo reizi pie pasaules čempionāta medaļām tikuši 2012. gadā, Norvēģijai tādu panākumu nav, kaut arī tā jau sen ir stabila elites grupas komanda. Norvēģi ir sīksti, fiziski ļoti spēcīgi un cīnās par ripu un katru metru laukumā.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Itālija – Kanāda
programme.desc: Itālija atkal spēlēs elites grupā un centīsies tajā nostiprināties, kanādiešiem allaž mērķis ir tikai viens - zelta medaļas. Tas arī komandai vairākkārt pēdējos gados izdevies, taču nesen ziemas olimpiskajās spēlēs finālā tomēr zaudēts ASV. Daudz kas būs atkarīgs no Kanādas sastāva šajā turnīrā, taču spēlē pret Itāliju kanādiešiem nevajadzētu būt problēmām.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Studija
programme.desc: Latvijai būs pirmā spēle turnīrā, un tā - ar pasaules čempionāta rīkotāju Šveici. Latvija jau 30 gadus pēc kārtas spēlē elites grupā, un zīmīgi, ka tālajā 1996. gadā Eindhovenā tieši ar neizšķirtu pret Šveici (1 pret 1) Latvija ieguva tiesības pirmo reizi spēlēt elites grupā. Šveicieši spēcīgāko sabiedrībā iekļuva nākamajā sezonā un kopš tā laika nemainīgi spēlē elites grupā, turklāt Šveicei ir vairākkārt izdevies iegūt medaļas, tā četras reizes jau spēlējusi finālā, kamēr mūsu izlasei pa spēkam reiz bijušas bronzas godalgas. Pirms turnīra pirmās spēles būs aktuālā studija ar hokeja ekspertiem - tajā runāsim par abu komandu sastāviem šajā turnīrā, līdzšinējām savstarpējām spēlēm un prognozēm pirms šāvakara mača. Dzirdēsim arī vairāku mūsu spēlētāju un treneru domas, tāpat jaunumus pretinieku nometnē. Šis pasaules čempionāts Latvijai jau būs bez ilggadējā izlases kapteiņa Kaspara Daugaviņa.

programme.title: Hokejs. Pasaules čempionāts. Latvija - Šveice
programme.desc: Pirmie pretinieki Latvijai ir ļoti nopietni, jo šveiciešiem pēdējos gados ir labi panākumi hokejā, turklāt izlase spēlē savās mājās. Komandai gan ir jauns treneris, jo līdzšinējais vadītājs Patriks Fišers pavasarī atzinis, ka uz Pekinas ziemas olimpiskajām spēlēm devies ar viltotu Covid-19 vakcinācijas sertifikātu. Pēc sabiedrības spiediena viņš atkāpies no amata, Fišeru aizstās līdzšinējais galvenā trenera asistents Jans Kadjē. Pirms tam bija nolemts, ka Fišeram šis būs pēdējais pasaules čempionāts galvenā trenera amatā un vēlāk tik un tā viņa vietā stāsies Kadjē. Šveicieši pēdējā laikā trīs reizes sasnieguši pasaules čempionāta finālu (kopā četras), bet izšķirīgajā spēlē par zeltu gan allaž zaudējuši. Šveice būs stipra, līdzšinējās 20 savstarpējās spēlēs Šveice uzvarējusi 13 reizes un Latvija - sešas (viens neizšķirts B grupas čempionātā Eindhovenā 1996. gadā). Tieši pasaules čempionātos arī bilance ir nedaudz par labu šveiciešiem: 5 pret 3. Latvijai jāiztur pretinieku spiediens, Šveice spēlē fiziski aktīvi, maz kļūdās; izlase darbojas kā labi noregulēts pulksteņa mehānisms.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Lielbritānija atkal atgriezusies elites grupā, savukārt, Austrija turpina nostabilizēties, pērn komandai pat izdevās kvalificēties ceturtdaļfinālam. Grupā tika iegūta ceturtā vieta (priekšā Latvijai, Slovākijai, Slovēnijai un Francijai), un tas jau liecina par komandas spēku. Pērn austrieši spēja apspēlēt slovākus un arī Latviju (6 pret 1), teorētiski viņi ir favorīti spēlē pret britiem.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Lielbritānija – Austrija
programme.desc: Lielbritānija atkal atgriezusies elites grupā, savukārt, Austrija turpina nostabilizēties, pērn komandai pat izdevās kvalificēties ceturtdaļfinālam. Grupā tika iegūta ceturtā vieta (priekšā Latvijai, Slovākijai, Slovēnijai un Francijai), un tas jau liecina par komandas spēku. Pērn austrieši spēja apspēlēt slovākus un arī Latviju (6 pret 1), teorētiski viņi ir favorīti spēlē pret britiem.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Ungārija – Somija
programme.desc: Somijai ir viena no stabilākajām hokeja valstsvienībām pēdējos desmit gados. Tā vairākas reizes bijusi pasaules čempionu godā, tāpat iegūts tituls olimpiskajās spēlēs. Pērn gan turnīrs neizdevās, ne pārāk pārliecinošs sniegums bija jau grupu turnīrā un ceturtdaļfinālā nācās atzīt ASV pārākumu. Ungārija pērn pasaules čempionātā palika septītajā vietā grupā un saglabāja vietu elites sabiedrībā, kas šai izlasei ir pats svarīgākais. Ungāru spēles līmenis vēl nav tik augsts kā labākajām pasaules komandām, taču piederība elites grupai jau apliecina hokeja augšupeju valstī.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Tāpat kā jūrā, arī šajā spēlē svarīga ir orientēšanās, intuīcija un drosme mesties nezināmajā! VIP ložā - burātāji, kapteiņi: Vita Matīse Lapiņa un Kaspars Rožkalns. Vita Matīse Lapiņa - komandas kapteine. Divkārtēja olimpiete vējdēļu sportā, kas Sidnejas un Atēnu ūdeņos nesa Latvijas vārdu pasaulē. Ikdienā māca jaunos burātājus un nodarbojas ar dizainu. Vēl aizvien aktīvi piedalās sacensībās un izbauda vēja spēles uz ūdens, ir vairākkārtēja pasaules čempione "Raceboard" klasē. Zane Atstāja - no burāšanas brīvajā laikā strādā ar satelītu datiem Lauku atbalsta dienestā. Zane ar vējdēli burā kopš pusaudžu gadiem. Zani raksturo kustība, vairākus gadus vaļaspriekos ir arī jahtu burāšana, motocikls un vācu aitu suņa skološana. Ilona Grīnberga - vairākkārtēja pasaules un Eiropas čempione, kā arī divu olimpisko spēļu dalībniece, ar vējdēļa burāšanu nodarbojas kopš 1984. gada un aizvien to turpina darīt. Vasarās Jūrmalā apmāca jaunos burāt gribētājus. Patīk ceļot, aktīvi darbojas gardēžu klubā. Kaspars Rožkalns - komandas kapteinis. Burātājs, buru laivu kapteinis, Latvijas Burāšanas savienības prezidents. Kaspars gandrīz vienmēr ir labā noskaņojumā. Drosmīgs, neglābjams optimists ar izcili strukturētu domāšanu. Ne tikai aizrautīgs vīziju zīmētājs, bet arī praktisks darītājs. Viņam noteikti ir vairāk stundu dienā nekā citiem. Kristīne Kanska - lielākās burāšanas regates "Gulf of Riga Regatta" iedvesmotāja un organizatore, sevi sauc par kalpošanas biedru burāšanas sportam. Burāšanas kaislību mantojusi ceturtajā paaudzē. Regate - "Gulf of Riga Regatta" - kļuvusi par Kristīnes otro bērnu, kas radīta un attīstīta kopā ar citiem līdzīgi domājošiem. Ivo Ivanovs - tāljūru jahtas "Spaniel" kapteinis, no 2010. gada piedalās tāljūru pārgājienos un sacensībās. Ir kvalifikācijas komisijas priekšsēdētājs kapteiņu tiesību iegūšani. Viņš un "Spaniel" komanda ar burāšanu ir iekārdinājusi simtiem jauniešu, šodien Ivo labprāt dalās ar savu pieredzi.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Valmiermuiža jau labu laiku ir populāra kultūrvieta, kurā notiek gan etnofestivāls un teātra izrādes, gan koncerti, brīvdabas kinoseansi un sacensības jāšanas sportā. Valmiermuižas vēsturē gan bijis daudz kāpumu un kritumu. 18.-19. gadsimtā tā bija daudz varenāka un nozīmīgāka par pašu Valmieru un latviešiem tik nozīmīgās Brāļu draudžu kustības atbalsta punkts, bet 20. gadsimta turbulencēs kļuva par nomali, kurā atradās cietums un padomju laikā arī sovhozs. Vēsturiskā apbūve tika pārveidota vai palēnām sagruva. 1990. gados Valmiermuižas centram tika noteikta aizsardzības zona, bet apsaimniekošanas ieceres (skolas celtniecība u. c.) netika īstenotas Viss mainījās pirms gadiem piecpadsmit, kad Valmiermuižā sāka saimniekot Aigars Ruņģis. Vēlāk tapa arī Valmiermuižas kultūras biedrība.

programme.title: Tutas Lietas
programme.desc: Cik rokai ir pirkstu? Kā pagatavot kūku no smiltīm? Un kā skan bungas? Izzinot sevi un pasauli, bērniem ir daudz jautājumu. "Tutas lietas" ir video stāstu sērija bērniem vecumā no viena līdz pieciem gadiem, ko žurnāliste un raidījumu vadītāja Marta Selecka radījusi kopā ar domubiedriem – mazu bērnu vecākiem no kino un TV profesionāļu vides. Raidījuma būtība – tas ir mīļš un izglītojošs ekrāna saturs pašiem mazākajiem, viņiem saprotamā valodā par interesantām un noderīgām tēmām. Raidījuma galvenā varone ir jaukā meitene, bērnu draudzene Tuta. Viņas lomā iejutusies aktrise un mamma Liene Sebre. Tuta mazajiem jautru rotaļu veidā māca pašus pirmos vārdus, krāsas, dziesmiņas un skaitļus. Kopā ar Tutu jaunas lietas bērniem apgūt palīdz arī draudzīgā un ziņkārīgā Lapsa. "Tutas lietu" stāstiņu kopējo konceptu veidojusi Marta Selecka, bet scenārijus sagatavojusi jaunā, talantīgā bērnu autore Inga Mastiņa. Bērniem saistošu radošu vizuālo noskaņu radījusi pieredzējusī dizainere Ilze Žūriņa-Šeibaka, bet Tutas dziesmas mūzikas autore un izpildītāja ir dziedātāja un komponiste Laura Polence. Tutas piedzīvojumus iemūžinājis operators Dāvis Doršs, bet projekta režiju un montāžu veidojusi Andra Doršs, kura par savu darbu Latvijas kino projektos ieguvusi arī Nacionālo kino balvu "Lielais Kristaps".

programme.title: Mazi Buzi Bums
programme.desc: Iepazīstieties, šis ir Buzis! Viņam ļoti patīk lasīt, bet vēl vairāk viņam patīk skatīties lielo bilžu grāmatu kopā ar savu mazo draugu. Tikai nez kur šodien paslēpies viņa draugs? Re, te viņš ir! Viņš paslēpies Buža kabatā. Opā! Tas taču ir Āpsītis! Āpsīti jūs noteikti jau pazīstat no raidījuma "Tutas lietas". Nu mazais Āpsītis ir nedaudz paaudzies un ar Buža palīdzību gatavs caur spēlēm, uzdevumiem, rotaļām un dziesmām iepazīt visdažādākās lietas. Pētīt balonus, kaķus, suņus, vistas, krūzes, bumbas, lietu, zirgus, kokus, traktorus, ābolus un cimdus aicināti arī mazie skatītāji pie TV ekrāniem. Bums!

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Slovēnija – Čehija
programme.desc: Čehija ar Slovēniju spēlē B apakšgrupā, un jānotiek brīnumam, lai slovēņi kvalificētos ceturtdaļfinālam. Tomēr katrā atsevišķā spēlē visādi var būt, to apzinās abas komandas. Čehiem gan turnīra kalendārs ir itin parocīgs, tā sāka turnīru pret Dāniju un nākamie pretinieki hokeja hierarhijā nepieder elitei. Redzēsim, cik NHL hokejistu būs Čehijas izlases sastāvā, jo daudzi varbūt vēl būs aizņemti Stenlija kausa izcīņā, tāpat iespējami savainojumi pēc garās sezonas NHL un ziemas olimpisko spēļu turnīra. Slovēnijai ir viena spilgta pasaules zvaigzne hokejā, tas ir Anže Kopitars no Losandželosas "Kings", ar viņu komanda savulaik tikusi arī pie Stenlija kausa. Šosezon "Kings" arī kvalificējās "play-off", taču jau pirmajā kārtā nācās tikties ar pamatturnīra uzvarētāju Kolorado "Avalanche", kur īsti cerību nebija. Kopitars Slovēnijai nozīmēja ļoti daudz, pēc pēdējās spēles pret Kolorado viņš beidza savu spožo 20 gadus ilgo karjeru NHL.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Lielbritānija atkal atgriezusies elites grupā, savukārt, Austrija turpina nostabilizēties, pērn komandai pat izdevās kvalificēties ceturtdaļfinālam. Grupā tika iegūta ceturtā vieta (priekšā Latvijai, Slovākijai, Slovēnijai un Francijai), un tas jau liecina par komandas spēku. Pērn austrieši spēja apspēlēt slovākus un arī Latviju (6 pret 1), teorētiski viņi ir favorīti spēlē pret britiem.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Džesika Leika, 18 gadus veca auklīte, tiek atrasta mirusi mājā, kur pieskatījusi mazuli. Iepazīstoties ar notikušā apstākļiem, Lūisam un Hatavejam rodas daudzi jautājumi. Vai slepkavība bija nejauša vai plānota? Vai iecerētais upuris nav bijis kāds cits, ņemot vērā, ka bērna vecākiem Adamsu pārim bija paredzēts atgriezties iepriekšējā vakarā? Turklāt mazuli parasti pieskata cita auklīte, un Džesika sarunāta pēdējā brīdī. Un kādēļ nogalinātā meitene pēc nāves piesieta pie gultas?

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Lielbritānija – ASV
programme.desc: Amerikāņiem it kā nevajadzētu būt problēmām spēlē pret britiem, bet grupu turnīra spēlēs visādi var būt, it īpaši sākumā. Te pirmais uzdevums ir būt labāko četru komandu vidū noslēgumā, lai kvalificētos ceturtdaļfinālam, grupā kāda spēle var arī neizdoties, un tā nav traģēdija. ASV izlase turnīra sākumā parasti vēl nerāda labāko sniegumu, jo sastāvs nav saspēlējies, ir arī pārlidojums uz Eiropu un aklimatizācija. To var mēģināt izmantot briti, ja vien viņiem pietiks spēka un meistarības. Reizēm Lielbritānijas hokejisti jau sagādājuši problēmas pat dižām komandām, un parasti tas noticis turnīra sākumā, jo beigās uzkrājas nogurums un briti vairs nav tik jaudīgi. Mūsdienu hokejā reti kad ir graujošs pārsvars kādai no komandām, tāpēc pat cīņā ar pastarīšiem favorītiem ir kārtīgi jānoskaņojas spēlei.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Sniegt lekciju Oksfordas kriminoloģijas nodaļā uzaicināts pretrunīgi vērtēts amerikāņu akadēmiķis Pols Jelands, kurš runā par ģenētiskās informācijas izmantošanu, lai laikus konstatētu potenciālos noziedzniekus. Viņa uzstāšanos pārtrauc protestētāji, kas profesora teoriju uzskata par vāji slēptu rasisma propagandu. Arī auditorijā izskan šaubu pilni un kritiski jautājumi. Kad nākamajā dienā profesors Jelands tiek atrasts miris ar cilpu ap kaklu savā istabā, izmeklētājiem jāsaprot - notikusi slepkavība vai pašnāvība. Hobsone drīz konstatē, ka kāds viennozīmīgi piedalījies lektora nāvē. Taču kurš no daudzajiem Jelanda nelabvēļiem būtu spējīgs uz slepkavību? Lūisam un Hatavejam jāatrisina noziegums, pirms sabiedrībā uzkuras rasu naids.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Dānija – Zviedrija
programme.desc: Agrāk Zviedrijai hokejā nebija nekādu problēmu spēlēs pret dāņiem, bet tagad tā vairs nav. Dānijas hokeja līmenis ir krietni audzis, ko pierāda arī viņu līdzdalība ziemas olimpiskajās spēlēs. Pekinā 2022. gadā tika sasniegts ceturtdaļfināls, un tāpat stabili dāņi spēlēja arī nesen Milānā, grupā uzvarot Latviju ar 4 pret 2, un "play-off" par tikšanu ceturtdaļfinālā tikai ar 2 pret 3 zaudējot Čehijai. Iepriekšējā pasaules čempionātā Dānija pat cīnījās par bronzas godalgām, kur gan zaudēja tieši zviedriem ar 2 pret 6, taču tas tāpat ir vēl nebijis Dānijas hokeja panākums.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Studija
programme.desc: Otra spēle turnīrā Latvijai svētdienas vakarā ir pret Vāciju, ko izdevās pārspēt nesen olimpiskajās spēlēs Milānā, turklāt ar lielāko vācu hokeja zvaigzni Leonu Draizaitlu sastāvā. Kopumā gan pēdējos gados savstarpējās spēlēs labāk veicies pretiniekiem, kaut senāk Latvija vairākkārt visai pārliecinoši apspēlējusi vāciešus. Laiki mainās, un tagad ekspertu vērtējumā par favorītiem vairums uzskata vāciešus, kaut tas neizslēdz, ka Latvija var uzvarēt šos pretiniekus. Pirms spēles būs hokeja studija, kurā runāsim par visiem pēdējiem jaunumiem, abu komandu līdzšinējām savstarpējām spēlēm un arī šī turnīra sākumu, dzirdēsim arī intervijas ar pašiem hokejistiem un treneriem.

programme.title: Hokejs. Pasaules čempionāts. Latvija - Vācija
programme.desc: Gaidāma vēl viena spraiga spēle pret fiziski ļoti spēcīgu komandu. Latvijai jābūt gatavai un arī jāspēj atjaunot spēkus, iepriekšējā vakarā bija smags pārbaudījums pret Šveici. Vācijas hokeja līmenis pēdējos 10-15 gados ir ļoti audzis, viņiem ir spēcīga vietējā līga, tāpat arī netrūkst spēlētāju NHL, šosezon tādu bija septiņi. Vācieši ir cīnītāji laukumā, fiziski ļoti spēcīgi un cīnās par katru kvadrātmetru laukumā, ir bīstami vārtu priekšā un pie apmalēm. Noteikti to visu būs ņēmuši vērā arī mūsu treneri, un ar pareizu taktiku Vāciju var apspēlēt, kas izdevās olimpiskajā turnīrā Milānā. Vācieši Milānas ziemas olimpiskajās spēlēs tika līdz ceturtdaļfinālam, kur gan zaudēja Slovākijai, par ko bija ļoti sarūgtināti. Toreiz izlases sastāvā bija arī izcilais Leons Draizaitls, un skaidrs, ka vācieši bija cerējuši uz ko vairāk, varbūt savu iespaidu atstāja arī zaudējums grupu turnīrā tieši Latvijai. Vācijas hokejs daudziem mūsu hokejistiem nav svešs, tostarp DEL līgas vienam no labākajiem vārtsargiem Kristeram Gudļevskim. Vācijā spēlē arī mūsu lielākais jaunais talants aizsargs Alberts Šmits, kuram paredz spožu nākotni NHL un vietu pirmajā desmitniekā NHL jauno spēlētāju izvēles draftā. Somijas "Jukurit" viņu izīrējusi Minhenes EHC klubam, kur Šmits jau aizvadījis gana daudz spēļu, ieskaitot 11 "play-off".

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Spēļu apskats
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā - par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi atpazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Svētdien bija daudz spēļu turnīrā, tostarp Latvija pret Vāciju.

programme.title: Pasaules čempionāts hokejā. Itālija – Slovākija
programme.desc: Katru vakaru būs aizvadīto spēļu apskati LTV7. Tajā - par visām todien aizvadītajām spēlēm, studijā būs arī kāds hokeja eksperts vai arī vienkārši sabiedrībā labi atpazīstams cilvēks, kuram hokejs nav vienaldzīgs. Tā ir lieliska iespēja atskatīties uz visām dienas spēlēm, redzēt gūtos vārtus un vēlreiz izbaudīt hokeja emocijas. Svētdien bija daudz spēļu turnīrā, tostarp Latvija pret Vāciju.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Mani hiti
programme.desc: "MyHits TV" atskaņo gan pašmāju, gan ārzemju labākos un karstākos šībrīža hitus – rūpīgi atlasīti TOP 40 formāta ritmi jūsu ekrānā!

programme.title: Mani hiti
programme.desc: "MyHits TV" atskaņo gan pašmāju, gan ārzemju labākos un karstākos šībrīža hitus – rūpīgi atlasīti TOP 40 formāta ritmi jūsu ekrānā!

programme.title: Mutant Weather
programme.desc: Warmer weather makes storms more volatile and unpredictable, causing sudden downburst thunderstorms, giant, destructive hail and random lightning strikes on a sunny day. As global temperatures rise, deadly rogue storm events are becoming more frequent and more widespread, including an increase in thunderstorms in the north. This episode follows the stories of witnesses and survivors of terrifying lightning strikes..

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI agents follow a possible meet up between one of their undercover agents and a smuggler delivering large quantities of meth in Atlanta. CBP officers in New York find a female passenger with several balloons of cocaine on her body and inside her vagina. She fails to remove one of them and is taken to a hospital. In Miami, CBP officers have to push for answers from passengers that clearly aren't telling the truth.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes advantage of the milder Yukon weather and tries her hand at a few new wilderness DIY projects; In the hopes of making his life in the bush "easier" - Matty digs deep - and searches for a less labor-intensive source of water. To accommodate the arrival of a few "four-legged" friends, Billy works on upgrading his backwoods property; And Emilie and Gilbert head into the wilds of Ontario - on the hunt for a source of spring-time sustenance.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Facing a spate of thunderstorms, Margot makes one final, all out push to complete her Yukon dream home. Billy builds a backwoods BBQ - the last step in his goal to turn his simple abode into the perfect wilderness homestead. With summer right around the corner, Matty takes steps to "up" his waterfront "game". And Emilie and Gilbert battle late season snows as they rush to complete their backcountry cabin before some very special guests arrive.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Copa Airlines Flight 201 Boeing 737-200 June 6th, 1992 Copa Airlines Flight 201 takes off from Panama City for the one-hour flight to Cali, Colombia. But with a major storm on the horizon, the pilots revise their flight path to avoid the heavy weather. After 12 minutes in the air, the captain radios controllers to tell them they've reached their cruising altitude of 25,000 feet. But moments later, the plane disappears from radar over one of the remotest jungles on earth.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to the Shetland Islands, a high-tech turboprop is struck by lightning, temporarily blinding the crew and disabling their controls. The pilots declare a Mayday as the plane plunges into a terrifying nosedive. Just seconds before impact, they manage to regain control. And once they're safely on the ground, investigators uncover an unusual feature in the plane that plays a key role in this calamity.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on a 1989 VW Golf GTi, one of the most iconic cars to have come out of the 1980s and one which just happens to be Tim Shaw's all-time favourite car. The boys challenge this time is to make this particular Golf suitable for its owner Darren, a former bus driver who was left disabled and partially sighted after a tragic road accident in which he saved the life of his young grandson.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Jersey in the Channel Islands to take on a 1972 Ford Escort Mexico. Owner Gary has been recovering from a horrific spell of ill health, having been struck down with both blood cancer and tuberculosis, and his family hope that his restored classic will give him a new lease of life. Once the boys get the car back to the workshop they quickly realise that not one single part of the car is salvageable.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Manchester to secretly steal away Stephen's 1983 Citroen 2CV, a quirky French economy car that was once the pride and joy of owner Stephen. When the boys arrive to steal the car away they discover that it has been stripped down to its component parts and looks more like a jigsaw than a car. Owner Stephen has been suffering from stage 4 throat cancer and his family hope that getting his 2CV back on the road will help give him a new lease of life.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Today Tim and Fuzz are off to Croydon South London to rescue a star car that has been wallowing in its own garage for over 30 years. The owner Peter is a serial petrolhead who has been fixing up motors for friends and family for most of his life, putting his own 60s classic on the back burner. The car is a 1964 Volvo P1800s, one of the most stylish cars to come off any production line ever , it was also the car synonymous with the cult 60s TV series "The Saint" . When it's owner Peter was struck down with a major stroke last year his plans to get his beloved P1800 back on the road became a distant dream, and that is when his family put out the Car SOS call. When Tim and Fuzz arrive they discover that the car is little more than a rusty shell and it quickly becomes the biggest job the boys have taken on to date. Tim however still finds time to go on a wild goose chase to try and get Sir Roger Moore , "the Saint" himself, to bless the car in time for it to be returned at the Classic Motor show at the NE , giving it's owner the surprise of his lifeC. Will Tim track down his hero? Will this mammoth project get finished in time ? Find out only on Car SOS.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Was the tragedy of the space shuttle Columbia baked into the original design? A wave of ship strikes has China's bridge builders working overtime. Temporary stages are easy to put up and easy to take down, but sometimes they come down at the wrong time: suddenly and all at once. Check out hotels that tumble; take a tour of some of the world's most expensive and useless airports, and learn why a Shanghai apartment tower dropped like a slab.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: When a bridge on an interstate highway collapses, investigators realize the problem might not be the vehicles moving across it, but the ones that aren't. Speaking of things handling heavy traffic, one New York City garage learns why supporting columns are called supporting columns. Also, what went wrong with collapsing Chinese roads and a collapsing French airport, a burning question about apartment block cladding, and why a supertall skyscraper went crooked.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: In Thailand, elevated highways keep falling down. A fire breaks out at a bakery in a Uruguayan shopping mall, and a bridge in Colombia collapses just before construction is finished. London's skyline has become a buffet of unsightly skyscrapers, and trucks everywhere are overloaded. Without proper shoring, a building in Iowa crumbles and houses in Rodanthe keep plunging into the ocean.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Nineveh was once the world's greatest city. The Bible describes it as a wicked city of sinners, from which Jonah flees and is swallowed by a whale. This season, archaeologists in Iraq and Israel uncover never-before-seen stone reliefs and make a shocking discovery inside Nineveh's city gate: the skeletons of two teenagers brutally killed in battle. Did the city deserve its fearsome reputation?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Iraq, archaeologists investigate the truth behind the legendary city of Babylon. First discovered in the 1800s, this vast ancient metropolis was home to extraordinary structures and a long line of notorious rulers. Babylon is one of the most famous cities in the Bible, mentioned hundreds of times, from the first book of Genesis to Revelation. But why did it have such a hold over the writers of the Bible? International teams of experts investigate ancient cities across Mesopotamia, which could shed light on this mystery. From the cultural wonders and dramatic history of Nineveh to the extraordinary ziggurat at Dur-Kurigalzu, exploring these sites helps reveal the real world of Babylon and illuminate why it was such a source of inspiration and fascination for the Bible's authors.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officials at El Dorado International Airport, in Bogota, Colombia, continue to foil the most audacious attempts at drug trafficking. On this new season of Airport Alert, they must detect sophisiticated new drug smuggling methods, arrest luggage thieves and detain suspects with international arrest warrants, while also dealing with medical emergencies, document forgery and cases of identity theft. Ranked as one of the 23 best airpots in the world, El Dorado is one of the biggest and most dynamic air terminals in Latin America. The airport serves 25 million passengers and handles 200,000 tons of cargo every year in its 1,100-hectare facility. Things are moving day and night, and appearances can be deceiving. Airport Alert follows agents 24/7 and captures their efforts to ensure the security of passengers and cargo alike.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Repatriating Indian nationals from Dubai in the midst of the COVID-19 epidemic, Air India Express Flight 1344 is on final approach to Calicut airport amid heavy showers, reduced visibility, and strong winds. The treacherous tabletop runway leaves no margin for error. And after a first missed attempt, the Boeing 737-800 touches down—yet fails to stop—and plunges into a gorge. The aircraft breaks apart on impact, killing 21 people, including the two pilots. At first, investigators suspect a problem with the braking system. But they soon discover a shocking malfunction of an entirely different nature. For some reason, the aircraft came in above the glide slope, flew well past the touchdown zone, and ran out of runway. And the fatal cause is logged on the cockpit voice recorder.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: November 27, 1987. A 747 Combi is on a routine flight toward South Africa when the cabin begins filling with smoke. Passengers struggle to breathe as crew members attempt to fight a fire in the cargo hold. After the plane disappears in the Indian Ocean, an unprecedented recovery operation is launched to locate and raise the wreckage from the ocean floor. Rumours swirl. Did illegal weapons bring down Flight 295?

programme.title: Atlantis Rising
programme.desc: Executive Produced by James Cameron, "Atlantis Discovered" is a 1x120 detective thriller that seeks out, uncovers and explores artifacts such as archaeological finds, satellite photographs, manuscripts hiding in plain sight, underwater exploration, etc. and attempt to "decode" the artifacts as springboards to further the investigation to get to the bottom of the story.

programme.title: Viking Warrior Women
programme.desc: It has always been thought that all Viking warriors were men, but new discoveries are challenging everything we thought we knew. Scientist and National Geographic Explorer Ella Al-Shamahi takes on a quest, using cutting edge science and technology to reveal evidence that elite Viking Warrior Women lived and fought more than a thousand years ago.

programme.title: Forbidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: Mongolia is being plundered. Illegal gold mining operations are proliferating across its vast landscape, desecrating its soil and polluting its rivers. The lost tomb of Genghis Khan, Mongolia's best-kept secret and only remaining tie to its spiritual and political forefather, could be unearthed and destroyed at any time. Can American engineer and explorer ALBERT LIN, equipped with cutting-edge technology and just a handful of obscure clues from ancient texts, find and protect the tomb of the Great Khan before it is destroyed? Albert's expedition has the blessing of the Mongolian government, but he has been forbidden to dig. In THE SEARCH FOR GENGHIS KHAN, we join Albert on a quest that seems impossible: to find a body without a shovel, somewhere in a territory that measures thousands of square miles in area. Lin's research leads him to search for a lost mountain-the Burkhan Khaldun-in the heart of the "forbidden zone." But to get there he must first conquer a series of natural obstacles, including an inhospitable landscape, swollen rivers, and violent storms. It is on the Burkhan Khaldun that Lin makes his most remarkable discovery, one that may solve an 800-year old mystery and cause waves in the archaeological community for decades to come.

programme.title: Tucci in Italy
programme.desc: Stanley discovers that Sicily is an island of contrasts and multiple influences, where its multicultural history has left a delicious mark on its food and people. He feasts on blood oranges, originally introduced to the region by the ancient Greeks; saffron-rich arancini, which came with the Arabs; and red prawns pulled from the ocean, thanks to the skills of the island's Tunisian fishers.

programme.title: Tucci in Italy
programme.desc: Stanley discovers how adversity has shaped this famed region and its capital, revealing a history of hardship that has resulted in creative culinary inventions. He explores the dark story behind Campania's famous tomatoes, reveals how buffalo milk went from zero to hero, and celebrates a once-forgotten wine grape. And on one of its lesser-known islands, Procida, he samples a very different take on pesto that is made with lemons.

programme.title: Access 360° World Heritage
programme.desc: The city of Venice attracts millions of tourist each year with its rich historic and artistic heritage. Behind the beautiful and vibrant facade, lies a city in grave danger. The Adriatic Sea that brought fortune and glory to the city is also a threat to Venice and its lagoon. When the sirens go off, Venetians brace themselves for an incoming attack. The tide rises, floodwater rushes into the city and destroys every artwork or architecture in its path. Expert teams of Engineers, Scientists and Conservators are determined to save this UNESCO World Heritage site from vanishing beneath the waves.

programme.title: Decoding History's Prophecies
programme.desc: When cases run cold, police in 1970s U.S. call upon the services of Dorothy Allison — the most celebrated "psychic detective" of her time. From the kidnapping of Patty Hearst to the crimes of Son of Sam, Allison sometimes provides incredible insights. In the 2010s, John of God is a leading light of the New Age movement with celebrity followers. He calls himself a psychic healer, but those closest to the man know that the truth is darker than anyone can imagine. In the first century C.E., Jewish commander Josephus is captured by the Romans. Apparently using ancient prophecy for political ends, he tells his captor, Roman General Vespasian, that he is prophesied to rule the world. The consequences have far-reaching effects on human history.

programme.title: Decoding History's Prophecies
programme.desc: In 16th-century France, astrologer Nostradamus wrote hundreds of cryptic verses implying impossible knowledge of future events, including the French Revolution, the Second World War, the assassination of JFK, and the attacks of Sept. 11, 2001. Who was Nostradamus, and what did he say? In Central Europe, local legends say Houska Castle guards a portal to hell and is the site of dark, storied history. Here, young poet Karel Hynek Macha had a feverish dream of a future that terrified him. In medieval Italy, St. Francis of Assisi was subjected to the world's first case of stigmata, receiving the wounds of the Christian messiah on his hands, feet and torso. Are the stigmata a blessing, a curse, or a traditional blend of legend and truth? Final

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officials at El Dorado International Airport, in Bogota, Colombia, continue to foil the most audacious attempts at drug trafficking. On this new season of Airport Alert, they must detect sophisiticated new drug smuggling methods, arrest luggage thieves and detain suspects with international arrest warrants, while also dealing with medical emergencies, document forgery and cases of identity theft. Ranked as one of the 23 best airpots in the world, El Dorado is one of the biggest and most dynamic air terminals in Latin America. The airport serves 25 million passengers and handles 200,000 tons of cargo every year in its 1,100-hectare facility. Things are moving day and night, and appearances can be deceiving. Airport Alert follows agents 24/7 and captures their efforts to ensure the security of passengers and cargo alike.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Airport workers go above and beyond to find a cat who escaped onto the runway upon landing. Lost and Found agents attempt to reunite travelers with a pair of memorial bracelets honoring a fallen service member, a bobblehead revering an iconic heavy metal band, and a mysterious bag with a personal "toy" tucked inside. The Unclaimed Baggage store receives a Fendi dress that could be worth $19K.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Determined airport workers across the country strive to reunite passengers with a curious assortment of lost items, including a prosthetic eye, an espresso machine, a $5000 Gucci bag and a family's beloved heirloom gold Rolex watch. At Philadelphia's International Airport, experts from the zoo arrive with an assortment of animals to help travelers combat the phenomenon known as "airport brain.""

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: An intrepid team of investigators in Denver and Salt Lake City reunites travelers with such lost items as a priceless Native American regalia, a taxidermied rat, a high school wrestling state championship ring, and a fanny pack with a wallet, passport and government IDs. Plus, we head down south to visit Unclaimed Baggage, a store brimming with a plethora of lost airport items shoppers can buy.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And what's the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And what's the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will, Bryan and Carla join local Waorani elder Penti Baihua in the Amazon, in search of the world's biggest snake: the giant green anaconda. They carefully remove just one scale from the 17-foot snake's skin. Will's fear turns into relief, then joy. The single scale can reveal the health of the entire ecosystem — crucial for the future of both wildlife and the Waorani.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will travels to the kingdom of Bhutan on a deeply intimate journey in search of the secret to happiness. Guided by happiness expert professor Dacher Keltner and local writer Tshering Denkar, Will treks to one of the highest and happiest villages in the Himalayas, at 13,000-foot altitude. While there, he confronts some of the most challenging moments of his extraordinary life and career.

programme.title: Guerilla Gold Rush: Deadly Endeavor
programme.desc: Investigative reporter Mariana Van Zeller uncovers the dark side of gold mining. Gold has fueled dreams and vast wealth in Colombian life for centuries. And everyone is chasing after it—corporate mining companies, artisanal miners, and armed groups. Van Zeller meets face-to-face with illegal river miners, a former intelligence officer, and a masked guerilla commander to get the inside story.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The Hollywood ending: During one of the bloodiest periods of conflict in the Middle East, a CIA officer faces the ultimate test of trust. Recruiting a mole inside al-Qaida is only the beginning; the real challenge is keeping him alive. Intelligence alone won't win the battle. The true test lies in safeguarding the life of a man who holds the key to countless operations. As danger closes in from every direction, loyalty, strategy and courage collide in a fight for survival.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: 27 March 1999, The Kosovan War. As night falls over Yugoslavia, an F-117 Nighthawk stealth bomber, with the call sign Vega 31. Two hours later, the target has been destroyed, but he is forced to eject after being hit by a Serb missile, pilot Dale Zelko is now falling towards enemy lines, it's only a matter of time before he's captured by the Serbs. A NATO rescue force must launch immediately to try and reach him first.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: It's 1982 and the War on Drugs is in its bloodiest year. Two DEA agents are sent on an aerial reconnaissance mission to Colombia where violent cartels run the drug trade into Miami by fugitive drug trafficker Rene Benetiz at the head. In the dead of night they are kidnapped at gunpoint and taken to the jungle where Benetiz and a corrupt policeman shoot them multiple times, where separated and severely wounded they must both fight to get out of the jungle alive.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The Inca Empire rose in the 15th century, yet its origins remained shrouded in mystery for centuries. Follow Manco Capac, the first Inca and Pachacutec, the mythical emperor who reshaped a civilization. Pachacutec built Machu Picchu, revolutionized architecture, and drew on the legacy of an older society to rewrite his people's history. Claiming the title "Son of the Sun," he expanded the empire beyond the Cuzco Valley, imposed a solar cult as the state religion, and even instituted human sacrifices to assert his power. With cutting-edge science and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Machu Picchu to Chilean volcanoes, Lake Titicaca, and Cuzco, witness the breathtaking birth of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: In less than a century, the Incas built monumental remains throughout their vast empire, but the secrets of their lightning-fast expansion remained unknown for centuries. Under the conqueror Tupac Yupanqui, the empire grew through force and clever alliances. He led the greatest territorial expansion of the Inca realm. He subdued the Incas' fiercest rivals along the Pacific coast. From Cuzco, the heart of his empire, he also established a vast imperial administration, supported by a 40,000-kilometer road network, custom-built administrative centers, and a curious accounting system based on knotted strings. Thanks to the latest scientific advances and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Cuzco to the Atacama Desert, via the Pacific coast, this is the lightning expansion of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya
programme.desc: National Geographic Explorer Albert Lin ventures into the Guatemalan jungle to explore how a new high-tech treasure map is revealing tens of thousands of ancient ruins. Now, dozens of archaeologists are heading on a voyage of discovery, exploring lost ruins for the first time in 1500 years. And what they're finding is rewriting the history of one of the world's most mysterious ancient civilisations - the Maya.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya
programme.desc: National Geographic Explorer Albert Lin ventures into the Guatemalan jungle to explore how a new high-tech treasure map is revealing tens of thousands of ancient ruins. Now, dozens of archaeologists are heading on a voyage of discovery, exploring lost ruins for the first time in 1500 years. And what they're finding is rewriting the history of one of the world's most mysterious ancient civilisations - the Maya.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: We begin with the tragic collapse of the Ponte Morandi (Morandi Bridge) in Genoa, 2018. Multiple camera angles capture the bridge crashing down in a rainstorm as vehicles drive across the iconic structure. An investigation uncovers a tale of neglect and aging concrete. The Millennium Tower was known as the most prestigious new condo tower in San Francisco. Now it's known for something else: it's sinking. It's leaning, the concrete is cracking, the glass is blowing out of the windows. How could a luxury complex of multi-million dollar residences fail so soon after construction?

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: When a bridge on an interstate highway collapses, investigators realize the problem might not be the vehicles moving across it, but the ones that aren't. Speaking of things handling heavy traffic, one New York City garage learns why supporting columns are called supporting columns. Also, what went wrong with collapsing Chinese roads and a collapsing French airport, a burning question about apartment block cladding, and why a supertall skyscraper went crooked.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: In Thailand, elevated highways keep falling down. A fire breaks out at a bakery in a Uruguayan shopping mall, and a bridge in Colombia collapses just before construction is finished. London's skyline has become a buffet of unsightly skyscrapers, and trucks everywhere are overloaded. Without proper shoring, a building in Iowa crumbles and houses in Rodanthe keep plunging into the ocean.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The Hollywood ending: During one of the bloodiest periods of conflict in the Middle East, a CIA officer faces the ultimate test of trust. Recruiting a mole inside al-Qaida is only the beginning; the real challenge is keeping him alive. Intelligence alone won't win the battle. The true test lies in safeguarding the life of a man who holds the key to countless operations. As danger closes in from every direction, loyalty, strategy and courage collide in a fight for survival.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: 27 March 1999, The Kosovan War. As night falls over Yugoslavia, an F-117 Nighthawk stealth bomber, with the call sign Vega 31. Two hours later, the target has been destroyed, but he is forced to eject after being hit by a Serb missile, pilot Dale Zelko is now falling towards enemy lines, it's only a matter of time before he's captured by the Serbs. A NATO rescue force must launch immediately to try and reach him first.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: Who fatally shot Italian Fascist dictator Benito Mussolini, without trial, after his capture by partisans, and why? What happened to the 'treasure' he carried with him, or was that the motive, perhaps documents that could discredit Churchill? - Was the most famous highwayman in Cromwell's republic executed as a traitor just for robbing notably parliamentarians, or executed for stubbornly proclaiming to remain an royalist, or did the Lord Protector carry a personal grudge beyond law? - Who laid the bomb that nearly blow up Napoleon Bonaparte, then Fisrt Consul, in his coach, and why? Did his security minister Fouché play a two-faced part?

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: From ancient times to the Second World War, Europe has been soaked in blood and intrigue. In this fascinating new series, Bloody Tales goes beyond the British Isles to seek out the Europe's most grisly history to discover the mysterious true stories behind some of history's most infamous tales. From East to West, from the UK to Istanbul, join historian Dr Suzannah Lipscomb and presenter Joe Crowley to investigate subjects that include Rome's famously cruel emperor Caligula and the notoriously violent Vikings. Using re-enactments, revisiting iconic locations and relying upon world-leading experts, can Suzannah and Joe sort fact from myth and rewrite some of history's greatest stories?

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: The Hollywood ending: During one of the bloodiest periods of conflict in the Middle East, a CIA officer faces the ultimate test of trust. Recruiting a mole inside al-Qaida is only the beginning; the real challenge is keeping him alive. Intelligence alone won't win the battle. The true test lies in safeguarding the life of a man who holds the key to countless operations. As danger closes in from every direction, loyalty, strategy and courage collide in a fight for survival.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: 27 March 1999, The Kosovan War. As night falls over Yugoslavia, an F-117 Nighthawk stealth bomber, with the call sign Vega 31. Two hours later, the target has been destroyed, but he is forced to eject after being hit by a Serb missile, pilot Dale Zelko is now falling towards enemy lines, it's only a matter of time before he's captured by the Serbs. A NATO rescue force must launch immediately to try and reach him first.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. Each week we show between 50 and 60 clips of misadventure - ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes. Each episode will feature several themes such as motorbike drifting, wakeboarding or attempting to fly drones. Clips are paused, re-wound, and re-played as we analyse exactly what went wrong and why. Richard Hammond explains the physics, chemistry and biology at play, by presenting forensic detail to explain the stupidity that resulted in failure. He'll study everything from acceleration to aero dynamics, fluid pressure to combustion and human anatomy to flammability. This is misadventure explained. This is The Science of Stupid.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: Secret Life of Predators is a National Geography documentary series narrated by Boone Smith, exploring animals that are on the top of the food chains in the environments they inhabit, such as eagles, tigers and bears. Meet some of the deadliest creatures, from rainforests and African savannas to the depths of the ocean. Find out the strategies these animals use to fight for their survival, and why are these hunter species the most successful when it comes to it.

programme.title: Python Invasion
programme.desc: Scientists and hunters team up to fight one of the biggest ecological threats to the Florida Everglades: the Burmese python. In the 1990s, pet pythons were released into the wild and have eaten their way through the food chain. Today, nobody knows how many there are, but estimates may be in the hundreds of thousands. We follow the scientists as they track, gather data, and try to understand better how Pythons reproduce and adapt in the Everglades. Ian Bartoszerk and his team at the Conservancy of Southwest Florida use male scout snakes to lead them to females with the potential to lay up to eighty eggs at a time. At the U.S.G.S., Amy Yackle and Mark Sandfoss work in tandem with wildlife biologists from the National Park Service and the University of Florida to battle female reproduction on another front — Alligator Alley.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators
programme.desc: Secret Life of Predators is a National Geography documentary series narrated by Boone Smith, exploring animals that are on the top of the food chains in the environments they inhabit, such as eagles, tigers and bears. Meet some of the deadliest creatures, from rainforests and African savannas to the depths of the ocean. Find out the strategies these animals use to fight for their survival, and why are these hunter species the most successful when it comes to it.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Land of Survivors. In Argentina's breathtaking, yet imposing wilderness, every day is a fight for survival. The terrain is rugged and parched. The air is thin. The weather can change in an instant. And then there are the predators.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Land of Water. Water shapes northern Argentina, creating paradises for unique wildlife. Whether it's sooty swifts swooping through waterfall floodwaters, frogs glowing in the dark, cute coati families in the undergrowth or mighty anacondas on the prowl.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to Vietnam's mountainous forests to discover endangered pangolins, Asian palm civets, and the golden-headed langurs of Cat Ba Island. The recently discovered Vietnamese crocodile lizard is already vulnerable to smuggling, while the critically endangered Delacour's langurs take refuge in a nature reserve. In springtime, an astonishing diversity of butterfly species congregates in the forest.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators: Compilation
programme.desc: Rivers and oceans are ruthless battlefields, constantly testing the bravery of even the biggest and deadliest carnivores.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Land of Survivors. In Argentina's breathtaking, yet imposing wilderness, every day is a fight for survival. The terrain is rugged and parched. The air is thin. The weather can change in an instant. And then there are the predators.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Land of Water. Water shapes northern Argentina, creating paradises for unique wildlife. Whether it's sooty swifts swooping through waterfall floodwaters, frogs glowing in the dark, cute coati families in the undergrowth or mighty anacondas on the prowl.

programme.title: Secret Life of Predators: Compilation
programme.desc: Rivers and oceans are ruthless battlefields, constantly testing the bravery of even the biggest and deadliest carnivores.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: Ruff' N Tumble. Sometimes taking care of critters can be a little 'ruff'. Scarlett the Labrador Retriever has a torn-up paw, while PeeWee the chihuahua has eye and prostate issues.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals Compilations
programme.desc: They are the backbone of the natural world, and in this documentary series, we explore some of the most interesting and amazing animals that roam our planet. Each episode focusses on two special creatures, revealing their characteristics and behaviours, and feature interviews with various experts alongside stunning video footage of the animals in their natural environments. A fascinating series that explores the animals' instincts and anatomies using state-of-the-art cameras and graphics, the creatures featured include polar bears, tigers, octopuses, elephants and orangutans.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals Compilations
programme.desc: They are the backbone of the natural world, and in this documentary series, we explore some of the most interesting and amazing animals that roam our planet. Each episode focusses on two special creatures, revealing their characteristics and behaviours, and feature interviews with various experts alongside stunning video footage of the animals in their natural environments. A fascinating series that explores the animals' instincts and anatomies using state-of-the-art cameras and graphics, the creatures featured include polar bears, tigers, octopuses, elephants and orangutans.

We follow the scientists as they track, gather data, and try to understand better how Pythons reproduce and adapt in the Everglades. Ian Bartoszerk and his team at the Conservancy of Southwest Florida use male scout snakes to lead them to females with the potential to lay up to eighty eggs at a time. At the U.S.G.S., Amy Yackle and Mark Sandfoss work in tandem with wildlife biologists from the National Park Service and the University of Florida to battle female reproduction on another front — Alligator Alley.

programme.title: Austria's Wild Heritage - One Country Six National Parks
programme.desc: The second part focuses on the challenges of the future: How do the national parks deal with invasive species from outside and what success stories can be reported? For instance, in the Hohe Tauern National Park the previously extinct ibexes and bearded vultures have been reintroduced. In the Gesäuse National Park Avalanches created one of the most species-rich habitats, which rare butterflies like the Red Apollo colonize.

programme.title: Wild Taiwan: Jungle Island
programme.desc: Explores the rural nature and exotic animals that live on Jungle Island.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Battle Of the Swamp Dragons
programme.desc: South Florida is the only place on Earth that is home to both the American alligator and the American crocodile. We'll compare the physical characteristics and behavior of these two prehistoric titans to find out who is the true Lord of the Swamp…

programme.title: Croc Wars: Grumeti Vs Mara
programme.desc: Each year, nearly two million wildebeest and zebra cross the Serengeti on a quest for fresh grazing. But two legendary rivers stand in their way—the Grumeti and the Mara—each ruled by a formidable dynasty of Nile crocodiles. In "Croc Wars," follow these ancient predators as they prepare for the feast of the year, but not all crocodiles are created equal. In the deep, fast waters of the Mara, privilege reigns, kills come easy, and food is plentiful. In the rugged Grumeti, crocodiles must outwit, adapt and fight for every scrap. From brutal ambushes to stolen kills, this is a high-stakes battle for survival on two rivers with two strategies and only one chance to eat.

programme.title: Python Invasion
programme.desc: Scientists and hunters team up to fight one of the biggest ecological threats to the Florida Everglades: the Burmese python. In the 1990s, pet pythons were released into the wild and have eaten their way through the food chain. Today, nobody knows how many there are, but estimates may be in the hundreds of thousands. We follow the scientists as they track, gather data, and try to understand better how Pythons reproduce and adapt in the Everglades. Ian Bartoszerk and his team at the Conservancy of Southwest Florida use male scout snakes to lead them to females with the potential to lay up to eighty eggs at a time. At the U.S.G.S., Amy Yackle and Mark Sandfoss work in tandem with wildlife biologists from the National Park Service and the University of Florida to battle female reproduction on another front — Alligator Alley.

programme.title: Komodo Dragons
programme.desc: A large adult male is determined to mate with a young female. A trivial episode in the animal kingdom, one might think.

programme.title: Reptile Planet
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. With evolution as their friend, reptiles are nature's ultimate survivors. From venom to bite force, reptiles have adapted in clever and lethal ways.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: When emergencies come in, the Critter Fixers get moving. An Australian shepherd is the victim of a dog attack; a puppy and a stray cat have broken legs; a rat terrier has pancreatitis; a cat eats its owner's hair tie; and a pair of alpacas are at death's door with parasites sapping them of life-giving blood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa Compilation
programme.desc: Primate Playtime. Celebrate International Primate Day with the orangutans, baboons, colobus monkeys and siamangs of Zoo Tampa.

programme.title: Austria's Wild Heritage - One Country Six National Parks
programme.desc: The second part focuses on the challenges of the future: How do the national parks deal with invasive species from outside and what success stories can be reported? For instance, in the Hohe Tauern National Park the previously extinct ibexes and bearded vultures have been reintroduced. In the Gesäuse National Park Avalanches created one of the most species-rich habitats, which rare butterflies like the Red Apollo colonize.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals Compilations
programme.desc: They are the backbone of the natural world, and in this documentary series, we explore some of the most interesting and amazing animals that roam our planet. Each episode focusses on two special creatures, revealing their characteristics and behaviours, and feature interviews with various experts alongside stunning video footage of the animals in their natural environments. A fascinating series that explores the animals' instincts and anatomies using state-of-the-art cameras and graphics, the creatures featured include polar bears, tigers, octopuses, elephants and orangutans.

programme.title: South America Untamed
programme.desc: An amazing journey through South America including never-before-seen footage of piranhas, macaws, giant river otters and Andean bears.

programme.title: Equator's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Life along the equator is spectacularly diverse. More than half of the world's species live here. Tropic Thunder is a 6 part archive series about Equator's wildest and most diverse ecosystems - the Amazon, the Andes, the Galapagos Islands, Borneo and Sumatra, Africa, and the Coral Sea. This series features a cornucopia of exotic animals in habitats ranging from steamy rainforests and great grasslands to snowy mountains and great reefs. Although there is access to plentiful food, fierce competition is still part of daily life on the equator. Great currents and trade winds also drive animals to adapt and behave in ways not seen in other wildlife hotspots? Welcome to the jungle, the mountain, the savannah and the rich reef?all part of the Equator's greatest hotspots.

programme.title: Amazonia
programme.desc: Predator Playground. Reveals a new world teeming with predators. Stealthy jaguars prowl, army ants swarm and tarantulas bring down rodent prey as 2.5 million square miles of rain forest emerge from the folds.

programme.title: Amazonia
programme.desc: The world's greatest rainforest is home to nearly half the world's species. Life-and-death dramas unfold in this most precarious of habitats, more than 100 feet above the forest floor, as Harpy eagles carry off full-grown monkeys.

programme.title: American Amazon
programme.desc: Hidden Forests. Take a journey into the secret wilderness of North America. An ancient bastion of life anchored in place by 2,000-year-old cypress trees. A labyrinth of flooded forests and pulsing arteries. A place buzzing with new stories.

programme.title: Living Edens
programme.desc: Life and death are close companions in an Eden called Costa Rica. Nestled in the tropics of Central America, Costa Rica calls itself the land of "Pura Vida" - pure life. In a phenomenon known as the "Arribada", the arrival, olive ridley sea turtles migrate annually in massive numbers while troops of capuchin, squirrel, howler monkeys and resplendent quetzals forage in the canopy above. Below roam deadly army ants, poison dart frogs and the strongest insect on earth, the Hercules beetle.

programme.title: Living Edens
programme.desc: Peru's Hidden Rainforest. Journey to the Manu Rainforest in Peru, a jungle Eden where flocks of parrots feast on clay licks, giant otters hunt in groups along the Manu River and groups of gentle sloths move slowly beneath the canopy.
